tasks.instruction: Save an in-person breast cancer support group that meets on Wednesday evenings within 20 miles of ZIP code 94103 to your support plan.

tasks.instruction: Set up a one-time credit card donation in the mid-$30 range to a patient transportation assistance fund, mark it anonymous with no email updates, and stop at the review step without paying.

tasks.instruction: Register for a free online evening nutrition webinar happening next calendar month and sign up yourself plus two guests (three attendees total).

target_names: Evening Nutrition for Chemotherapy: Eating When Nothing Sounds Good

tasks.instruction: Save the three highest-rated articles about chemotherapy side effects from the last two years, with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, to your reading list.

target_names: Chemotherapy Side Effects: What to Expect and How to Cope

tasks.instruction: Using the care planner as a newly diagnosed patient, create a roadmap with three tasksone to prepare questions for an upcoming doctor visit, one to attend a support group, and one for a short daily walkeach scheduled for specific upcoming dates with on-site-only reminders.

target_names: Prepare questions for your next doctor visit
